vocab.meaning: tận hưởng, đắm mình trong (bầu không khí, ánh nắng)
vocab.example: Many urban dwellers head to the park just to soak up the sun and enjoy the fresh air away from the smog.

vocab.meaning: ngừng suy nghĩ về công việc/rắc rối, nghỉ ngơi hoàn toàn
vocab.example: Walking amidst greenery helps people switch off from the relentless pressure of their digital lives.

vocab.meaning: giải tỏa, làm sạch (tâm trí, phổi)
vocab.example: A brisk walk is perfect to clear out the cobwebs in your head after a long day of mental exertion.
The park is a great place to take in the scenic views and the changing colors of the seasons.

vocab.meaning: tiêu hao (năng lượng dư thừa, calo, căng thẳng)
vocab.example: Parents often take their children to the local playground to let them burn off some steam.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn, át đi (tiếng ồn, sự xao nhãng)
vocab.example: The dense line of trees in the park helps to block out the constant drone of city traffic.

vocab.meaning: thư giãn dần dần sau một hoạt động căng thẳng
vocab.example: I find that strolling through a botanical garden is the ultimate way to wind down on a Sunday afternoon.

vocab.meaning: tình cờ bắt gặp (thứ gì đó thú vị)
vocab.example: If you wander off the beaten path in larger parks, you might stumble across a hidden pond or a rare bird.

vocab.meaning: chơi đùa, làm những việc linh tinh thư giãn
vocab.example: Groups of teenagers often gather in open spaces just to muck about and kick a ball around.

vocab.meaning: trốn thoát khỏi, rời xa (nơi nào đó ngột ngạt)
vocab.example: People flock to public gardens primarily to get away from the concrete jungle and reconnect with nature.
